item.column: id, name, description, category, price, stock

order.column: id, name, description, category, price, stock, @item_list

@item_list.title: item list
@item_list.sql: SELECT i.name as item_name, oi.quantity, oi.price_per_item FROM order_items oi JOIN item i ON oi.item_id = i.id WHERE oi.order_id = ?
